content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ of positive integers and an integer KKK. You are allowed to perform the following operation any number of times (including zero):


choose an index jjj between 111 and NNN inclusive
choose a positive divisor ddd of AjA_jAj​ such that d≤Kd \le Kd≤K
divide AjA_jAj​ by ddd
Determine if it is possible to modify the sequence AAA in such a way that it would satisfy the following condition: there is no positive integer strictly greater than 111 which divides every element of AAA. (In other words, the greatest common divisor of all elements of AAA should be 111.)
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing the string `"YES"` if it is possible to make the GCD of all elements of AAA equal to 111 or `"NO"` if it is impossible.
